member.name: M:GTA.ShapeTest.StartTestMouseCursorLOSProbe(GTA.IntersectFlags,GTA.Entity,GTA.ShapeTestOptions)
member.summary:
Start a shape test between 2 points calculated based on the mouse cursor position. Works just like
only the start and end points of the probe are calculated based on the mouse cursor position projected into the world.
member.param: What type of objects the shape test should intersect with.

Specify an
that the shape test should exclude, leave null for no entities ignored.
Specify options for the spape test.
member.value:
The shape test handle and the start and end points of the probe are calculated based on the mouse cursor position projected into the world. If this method fails to create the shape test request because there are too many ongoing requests,
will return
on the handle struct.
